source_description: Discovered during giiken boot-to-browser smoke testing on waaseyaa/* ^0.1.0-alpha.173. CsrfMiddleware in waaseyaa/user exempts application/json (Inertia default) but rejects multipart/form-data with 403 Invalid Security Token, blocking any Inertia form using forceFormData: true. Token is stored only in $_SESSION['_csrf_token'] with no JS-reachable surface (no XSRF cookie, no meta tag, no Inertia shared prop).
